entity.summary: South Korea-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2017. Coinrail suffered a major June 2018 hack, resumed trading on July 15, 2018 after security and recovery work, and is now tracked as inactive with no active markets rather than as a definitively closed exchange.
entity.notes: The June 2018 hack is already represented in canonical history and is not duplicated. A separate reopening event records the July 15, 2018 service return. HEI retains inactive rather than dead status because current trackers show zero active markets but no definitive shutdown announcement or terminal operating date has been established.

expected.summary: South Korea-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2017. Coinrail suffered a major June 2018 hack reported at roughly $40 million, later resumed service, but current market-data trackers show no active markets or classify it as inactive / untracked.
expected.notes: HEI models Coinrail as inactive rather than dead because the current evidence set supports historical operation, a major 2018 hack, and current lack of tracked markets, but does not establish a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date.

changes.summary: South Korea-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2017. Coinrail suffered a major June 2018 hack, resumed trading on July 15, 2018 after security and recovery work, and is now tracked as inactive with no active markets rather than as a definitively closed exchange.
changes.notes: The June 2018 hack is already represented in canonical history and is not duplicated. A separate reopening event records the July 15, 2018 service return. HEI retains inactive rather than dead status because current trackers show zero active markets but no definitive shutdown announcement or terminal operating date has been established.

events.title: Coinrail resumed trading after the June hack
events.description: Coinrail resumed exchange services on July 15, 2018 after the June cyber intrusion, introducing recovery arrangements for affected assets while trading restarted in stages.
events.notes: This is a historical recovery marker. It does not imply that Coinrail remains operational today.

evidence.title: Crypto Exchange Coinrail Reopens with Offers to Recover 11 Cryptocurrencies
evidence.notes: Contemporary report stating that Coinrail resumed service on July 15 and describing its asset-recovery arrangements.

evidence.title: Coinrail relaunches, offers recovery of 11 cryptocurrencies
evidence.notes: Secondary confirmation of the July 15, 2018 operational restart.

evidence.title: Coinrail exchange statistics
evidence.notes: Current tracker page shows zero available coins and trading pairs, supporting inactive rather than active treatment.
